title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Kenya, and you've built a loyal following for your ebooks. However, you're stuck in a frustrating situation: every major payment platform has blocked your account due to geographic restrictions or KYC requirements. PayPal, Stripe, Payhip, and Gumroad all claim you're a high-risk merchant, and you're left wondering how to get paid for your hard work. This guide is here to help you break free from the shackles of traditional payment processors and start selling ebooks like a pro.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The geographic exclusion that creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh face from conventional payment platforms is not the result of individual decisions — it is systemic. PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad all operate within the traditional financial system, which means they are subject to the same correspondent banking relationships, compliance requirements, and risk frameworks that make international money movement difficult in certain corridors. Blockchain-based payments operate outside this system entirely. A USDT transaction from a buyer in Germany to a seller in Lagos does not pass through any correspondent bank. It does not require a compliance officer to approve the corridor. It settles peer-to-peer, on-chain, in under 60 seconds.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a few essential tools: a digital product (your ebook), a marketing strategy to reach your target audience, and a payment pipeline to process transactions. Don't worry if you don't have all these pieces in place yet; we'll cover everything you need to know in this guide. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to everything you need to start selling ebooks, including automated delivery and payment verification.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment pipeline is a breeze with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. Simply create a NOWPayments account, choose the payment methods you want to accept, and integrate Unchained Commerce's payment gateway into your website or landing page. With automated delivery and payment verification, you can focus on marketing and promoting your ebooks while Unchained Commerce handles the rest.
Don't let KYC requirements hold you back from selling ebooks from Kenya.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to a user-friendly dashboard where you can track your sales, manage orders, and receive real-time analytics. Simply promote your ebook to your audience, and get ready to collect your first payment in the bank, hassle-free.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've made your first sale, it's time to scale your ebook business to new heights. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you grow your business. Simply focus on creating more content, marketing to new audiences, and let Unchained Commerce handle the payment processing and delivery pipeline for you.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

What if I told you that you can start selling ebooks from Kenya without worrying about KYC or geographic restrictions? With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle and NOWPayments, you can break free from the shackles of traditional payment processors and start collecting payments from anywhere in the world. It's time to take control of your ebook business and start selling like a pro.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the ultimate solution for creators like you who want to break free from traditional payment processors.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're a digital creator in Kenya, you're not alone in struggling to get paid for your ebooks. Many creators face similar challenges, from KYC requirements to geographic restrictions. If you're interested in learning more about blockchain-based payment systems and how to use them to sell ebooks, be sure to check out our related articles on using crypto for ecommerce and the benefits of decentralized payment processing. With Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can start selling ebooks like a pro and reach a global audience.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling ebooks from Kenya, follow these concrete action steps: 1) Create a NOWPayments account and choose the payment methods you want to accept. 2) Integrate Unchained Commerce's payment gateway into your website or landing page. 3) Set up automated delivery and payment verification with Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. 4) Promote your ebook to your target audience and get ready to collect your first payment in the bank, hassle-free. 5) Focus on creating more content, marketing to new audiences, and let Unchained Commerce handle the payment processing and delivery pipeline for you.
With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can accept payments from anywhere in the world without worrying about geographic restrictions.
